summary: Frontend-only verification of Outreach tab in Governance Console. All 6 requested checks PASS: admin login, gov-tab-outreach renders, template dropdown has 4 pilot options (RE 5/10 + B2B 5/10 with $200/$350), selecting template populates subject/body containing '92+' and price, sandbox send returns success message ('Sandbox test sent to admin@nexus.io'), compare link points to /launch/compare.html (HTTP 200, contains competitor/graph markup), and gov-pilot-leads regression still renders with Refresh + Export CSV buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: tabs.jsx is ~1078 lines — consider splitting each Panel component into its own file for maintainability (per >700 line guideline).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Outreach tab in Governance Console is fully functional. Templates endpoint returns 4 pilot options (re_pilot_10/5, biz_pilot_10/5). Sandbox send successfully returned 'Sandbox test sent to admin@nexus.io (sample: Diendei, LLC).' — Resend delivery worked. compare.html served 200. Login via API POST /api/auth/login then goto /dashboard works reliably to bypass cookie issues.
